profile.name: OpenMontage

intro.desc: Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio. Describe what you want in plain language — your agent handles research, scripting, asset generation, editing, and final composition.

install_hints: > **No `make`?** Run manually: `pip install -r requirements.txt && cd remotion-composer && npm install && cd .. && pip install piper-tts &&
